ui.title: UI Preferences
ui.savedHint: Theme & language changes apply instantly across the whole UI — no reload needed.

apiKey.title: API Key Status
apiKey.info: API keys are never stored in the UI or written to the database — this avoids leaking credentials through backups. Inject keys via environment variables and restart mimo2codex:

dataDir.title: Local Data Directory
dataDir.hint: The data directory is fixed at startup (CLI --data-dir or env MIMO2CODEX_DATA_DIR) and cannot be changed from the UI. Defaults to ~/.mimo2codex/.
